events: Compassion Sword tests Gongja's worth by examining his memories
Gongja proves his compassion and absorbs the black dragon's blade
Black Dragon corpse dissolves, ending winter and bringing spring
Librarian reveals his dream: to appear as a character in the Epic of Lefanta Aegim
Heavenly Demon's body disappears, leaving red peony flowers in its place
Gongja challenges cult members to sword matches instead of a funeral
skills: Compassion Sword (new ability: inflicts pain without physical wounds)
cause_effect: Gongja's willingness to show his memories earns the Compassion Sword's loyalty
Absorbing the sword fragment ends the eternal winter of the Murim world
The Librarian admires Lefanta Aegim and wants to appear in his story
Heavenly Demon's pure energy transforms into peonies, symbolizing spring
chapters.notes: The Librarian is a fan of the Constellation Killer (Lefanta Aegim) and wants to be killed by him. The chapter ends with spring coming to the Murim world and Gongja becoming the Young Master of the Demonic Sect.

events: Venomous Snake moves Chen Mu-mun headquarters to 22nd floor
Alchemist opens new pharmacy on 20th floor with Death King's help
Medicine King jealous of Alchemist's success
25th floor attack team fails - Count and Crusader die
Tale of Sormwyn Academy (Romance Fantasy) introduced as next Apocalypse
Librarian reveals he prepared perks for Death King (character windows)
loops: Death King regresses to before the attack team decision
cause_effect: Count and Crusader failed because they were consumed by character immersion
Death King realizes he must take charge of the romance stage himself
The Heretic Questioner is chosen for his appearance despite being a psychopath
chapters.notes: The 25th floor Apocalypse is a romance fantasy where the villainess's fiance was stolen by a reincarnated girl. Death King decides to challenge it to save his colleagues and find Holy Sword fragments.

events: Death King takes command of 25th floor attack team
Chooses Heretic Questioner as partner despite objections
Librarian gives three cards: Facial Recognition Barrier, Overhearing Secrets, Oops I Said Wrong Thing
Death King and Heretic Questioner enter the Apocalypse
Heretic Questioner becomes the Lady of the Golden Silk
Death King becomes the butler
skills: What a coincidence! Overhearing crucial secrets! Card
Oops! I shouldn't have said this! I said something wrong! Card
cause_effect: Death King's rank and prophecy reputation convince others to let him lead
Heretic Questioner's angelic appearance makes him suitable for romance
The Librarian prepared special romance-themed cards for this stage
chapters.notes: The Apocalypse assigns roles: Heretic Questioner is the female protagonist (Sylvia Evanail), Death King is her butler. The villainess (Lady of Silver Lily) slaps Heretic Questioner at the ball.

characters: Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Heretic Questioner uses Sacred Technique Transformation to become more feminine
Assassins attack through the window
Death King and Heretic Questioner defeat the attackers
Crown Prince arrives to 'rescue' them
Death King deduces the prince orchestrated the attack
cause_effect: The prince's genuine concern reveals he cares for the Lady of Golden Silk
The attackers knew exactly where to find them, suggesting inside information
Death King's detective skills impress the Heretic Questioner
chapters.notes: The crown prince has ramen-like blond hair and is described as superficial. Death King and Heretic Questioner establish code words to maintain their identities.

characters: Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Introduction of Lady of Golden Silk (Sylvia Evanail) and Lady of Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia) backgrounds
Crown prince shows favoritism to Lady of Golden Silk
Immersion rate system revealed - Death King at 3%, Heretic Questioner at 10%
Death King sarcastically implies prince set up the raid
Lady of Silver Lily confronts them in the hallway
skills: Character Window (Death King can see psychological states)
cause_effect: The more they act like their characters, the deeper the immersion
The prince's jealousy and protectiveness drive the plot
Lady of Silver Lily's presence causes immediate tension
chapters.notes: The two ladies have opposing epithets from the emperor: Golden Silk (heroine) and Silver Lily (villainess). The crown prince is officially engaged to the Lady of Silver Lily but loves the Lady of Golden Silk.

characters: Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Lady of Silver Lily and Lady of Golden Silk exchange barbs
Death King establishes password: 'When spring comes, magnolias fall'
Bad girl/bad butler strategy to reduce immersion
Summon Flame Emperor to teach how to be bad
Plan to break the prince's love line
cause_effect: Acting out of character slows or reverses immersion
The Flame Emperor's personality is used as a template for bad behavior
Death King realizes breaking love is easier than creating it
chapters.notes: The Heretic Questioner is surprisingly good at playing the bad girl. Death King makes salty tea to fight immersion.

characters: Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
events: Heretic Questioner insults 14 ladies, causing them to faint ('Is Your Head Well' incident)
Servants challenge Death King to duels for honor
Heretic Questioner charges 5 gold coins per duel
Death King beats multiple servants easily
Crown prince arrives and is outmaneuvered by the bad butler act
Heretic Questioner rejects prince's advances with fan
cause_effect: The bad girl act successfully reduces immersion rate increases
Charging for duels subverts romance expectations
The prince's love persists despite the bad behavior
chapters.notes: The Heretic Questioner enjoys being bad. The 'Is Your Head Well' incident becomes legendary. Death King's immersion is at 6%.

characters: Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Crown prince and Heretic Questioner do synchronized laughter (ohoho/mwahaha)
Bae Hu-ryeong explains that love cannot always be cut easily
Lady of Silver Lily invites them for a walk
Leads them to basement where three servants are tied up
Reveals she captured the real culprits behind the assassination
Shows her scarred arms from self-punishment
cause_effect: The prince is revealed as the true mastermind but Lady of Silver Lily covers for him
Lady of Silver Lily takes blame to protect the prince (her loyalty/fiance)
Her scarred arms show history of taking punishment for others' sins
Death King's immersion rises to 7% from fascination with Lady of Silver Lily
chapters.notes: The Lady of Silver Lily is not simply evil - she is complex and sacrifices herself for the prince. Death King feels instinctive attraction/obsession toward her.

characters: Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Lady of Silver Lily forces prince to execute the servants
Prince tries to flee but Death King blocks him
Heretic Questioner executes one servant easily
Death King forces prince to hold sword and kills last servant
Prince breaks down and runs away
Death King's immersion rises to 9%
locations: Lady of Silver Lily's villa basement
deaths: 3 servants (executed by Lady of Silver Lily, Heretic Questioner, and Death King)
cause_effect: Lady of Silver Lily creates false testimony to protect the prince's reputation
The prince's cowardice is fully exposed
Death King's butler instincts merge with his own feelings of anger at the prince
The execution scene bonds the four characters in shared guilt/secrecy
chapters.notes: Death King realizes he wants to understand the Lady of Silver Lily. The chapter explores themes of loyalty, sacrifice, and the weight of sin.

characters: Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Lady of Silver Lily absent from academy (illness)
Death King and Heretic Questioner have tea in the garden
Heretic Questioner reveals his past: 1st generation Hunter massacre
4,653 people died first night, then tens of thousands more
Black Dragon Witch, Count, Venomous Snake, Sword Saint all participated
Sword Saint resigned from Civil Militia commander position
Heretic Questioner feels regret for first time due to immersion
Death King decides he cannot kill someone who knows regret
Heretic Questioner's immersion reaches 50%
skills: Sacred Technique: Hidden Spirit (makes things disappear)
cause_effect: The 1st generation Hunters committed massacres to stabilize the Tower
The Heretic Questioner's psychopathy stems from being able to erase evidence easily
Immersion gives him emotions for the first time, making him feel regret
Death King realizes the Heretic Questioner is redeemable
chapters.notes: This is a major backstory chapter revealing the dark history of the Tower's early days. The Heretic Questioner is from Bulgaria and is a first-generation Hunter.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Lady of Silver Lily reveals she is a regressor in her 14th session
She repeats the last 10 days of her life forever
Gongja reveals he is also a regressor but dies to go back 24 hours
He explains his trauma-viewing ability
Lady of Silver Lily agrees to teach him about love
Librarian grants 'skip the scene' for private conversation
locations: Lady of Silver Lily's office at Sormwyn Academy
cause_effect: Lady of Silver Lily recognizes Gongja as different from other 'actors' because he sees people as human
Gongja shares his secret to build trust with a fellow regressor
The Librarian (Hamustra) is revealed as a moderate Constellation
Lady of Silver Lily's heart is 'silver-plated' - unable to love normally
chapters.notes: Raviel Ivansia is the true name of the Lady of the Silver Lily. She knows the Librarian's true name is Hamustra. She has poisoned previous apostles who tried to 'capture' her with strategy guides.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Gongja becomes Lady of Silver Lily's exclusive servant for one week
Lesson 1: Love starts like a bitch (both parties are flawed)
Lesson 2: If you can't avoid the bitch, enjoy what you can / Become a bigger bitch
Lady of Silver Lily water-wakes the crown prince at 5am
Gongja tears up the Librarian's strategy cards to show sincerity
Lady of Silver Lily applies lily perfume behind Gongja's ear
Immersion rate rises to 15%
locations: Lady of Silver Lily's dressing room
skills: What a coincidence! Overhearing crucial secrets! Card (destroyed)
Oops! I shouldn't have said this! Card (destroyed)
cause_effect: The Lady of Silver Lily's lessons are cynical but practical
Destroying the cards proves Gongja's sincerity to her
The perfume scene creates romantic tension and raises immersion
The crown prince is portrayed as lazy and unworthy of her love
chapters.notes: The Lady of Silver Lily has dull taste buds and likes exciting food. She is pragmatic and prefers political conversations. The 'love equation': Handsome < Smart < Bitch.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Gongja is lovestruck, thinking about Raviel constantly
Bae Hu-ryeong teases him about being struck by love
Shiny strikes Gongja's head to bring him back to senses
Lady of Silver Lily takes Gongja to see her secret at night
She reveals the Sword of Prayer embedded in a mirror
Explains she stabbed her heart to make her love last forever
Her heart is now immortal/silver-plated, but she has no heart to give
Blood demons form from the mirror
locations: Lady of Silver Lily's residence hallway (night)
skills: Sword of Prayer (fragment of Guardian Goddess - 3rd sister)
cause_effect: Gongja falls in love with Raviel despite (or because of) her cynicism
The Sword of Prayer grants wishes by stabbing the heart
Raviel's wish for eternal love made her a semi-Constellation
The blood demons are her familiars, born from her suppressed negative emotions
chapters.notes: Gongja's immersion rate reaches 30%. The Lady of Silver Lily's mother's trauma is hinted at. The mirror bleeds because of her heart's condition.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
events: Blood demons manifest at midnight - tongues, lips, hands
Demons reenact past memories like a play (crown prince's childhood proposal)
Gongja uses Infernal Heavens Demonic Art 8th form: Sword of Incineration
Lady of Silver Lily reveals she became a Constellation when she stabbed her heart
The world has no original Constellation (or it was killed by Lefanta Aegim)
The demons grow stronger each day, and on the 10th day they destroy the world
Gongja declares he will make her love him and free her from the eternal loop
locations: Lady of Silver Lily's residence hallway
skills: Infernal Heavens Demonic Art - 8th form: Sword of Incineration
cause_effect: The blood demons are Raviel's familiars and represent her suppressed feelings
She became a semi-Constellation accidentally through the sword fragment
Gongja realizes he loves her and wants to understand her
The 10-day loop is caused by her wish and the sword's power
chapters.notes: Bae Hu-ryeong notes her ascension is an 'evil path' like a demonic cultivation. The demons don't resist because they recognize allies. The chapter ends with Heretic Questioner/Lady of Golden Silk arriving.

characters: Lady of the Silver Lily (Raviel Ivansia)
Heretic Questioner (as Lady of Golden Silk)
events: Heretic Questioner arrives at midnight to reclaim 'his butler'
Lady of Silver Lily orders caning for trespassing
The two ladies confront each other - sun and moon metaphor
Heretic Questioner shows signs of complete immersion (longer hair, different personality)
Lady of Silver Lily canes the Lady of Golden Silk
Crown prince arrives and takes Lady of Golden Silk's side
Gongja chooses to stay with Lady of Silver Lily
Character window reveals Heretic Questioner is 90% immersed
Gongja's immersion rises to 43%
skills: Character Window (reveals Heretic Questioner's immersion at 90%)
cause_effect: The Heretic Questioner is being consumed by the Lady of Golden Silk character
Lady of Silver Lily uses law and hierarchy to justify punishment
The crown prince shows his weakness by taking the easy way out
Gongja's choice to stay with Raviel increases his immersion but also his resolve
chapters.notes: The Heretic Questioner's character window shows Favorability 90, Favorite Genre [Romance], Hated Character [Raviel Ivansia]. The moon appears red with 'sand' (blood).
